summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: Calculating pH and pOH using Log
summary_sections.content_html:
Core Definitions

  • pH Formula: pH = ‚ąílog[H‚Āļ], where [H‚Āļ] is the molar concentration of hydrogen ions.
  • pOH Formula: pOH = ‚ąílog[OH‚ĀĽ], where [OH‚ĀĽ] is the molar concentration of hydroxide ions.
  • Reverse Calculation: [H‚Āļ] = 10‚ĀĽŠĶĖŠīī and [OH‚ĀĽ] = 10‚ĀĽŠĶĖŠīľŠīī.
  • Key Relationship: pH + pOH = 14; [H‚Āļ] √ó [OH‚ĀĽ] = 1.0 √ó 10‚ĀĽ¬Ļ‚Āī at 25¬įC.
